de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessLayout

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.SymbolicLayoutReader.AbstractKeYlessElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessLayout
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ISymbolicElement, ISymbolicLayout
    Enclosing class:
    SymbolicLayoutReader

    public static class SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessLayout
extends SymbolicLayoutReader.AbstractKeYlessElement
implements ISymbolicLayout
    An implementation of ISymbolicLayout which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel
